verbatim_text: If you remember, how we reward a trace for exploration is progress measured via the advantages of a complementary LLM. And these two pieces would now define this training objective. You can go and maximize it. But you can ask me, why this objective? Why this sampler? Why this reward? Why even this procedure? We could have chosen a very different way of learning an algorithm. And for that, I like to quote a result here. It's a theoretical result from one of my papers, which compares the performance of the algorithm that you do get by using our sampler and reward against an algorithm you get by training on curated data. So in the pre-trained model satisfies some criteria. I'm happy to go into this later. There are some criteria that are satisfied. And you can compare the performance of the sampler and the reward, which I denote with these two boxes.
